entries.content: For targeted Vitest evidence in plugin/, prefer `pnpm exec vitest run <file>` over `pnpm test -- <file>` when exact file selection matters; the latter can still run broader suites and surface unrelated integration timeouts.

For command skill-ref asset tests, fallback/degradation assertions should be scoped near each skill reference, not file-wide, so additional refs in the same command cannot accidentally inherit unrelated fallback wording.
